nasb.text: For consider Him who has endured such hostility by sinners against Himself, so that you will not grow weary and lose heart.

esv.text: Consider him who endured from sinners such hostility against himself, so that you may not grow weary or fainthearted.

cnv.text: 這位忍受罪人那樣頂撞的耶穌，你們要仔細思想，免得疲倦灰心。

ccb.text: 你们要思想忍受罪人如此顶撞的主，免得疲倦灰心。

csbs.text: 其实，你们应当仔细地思想耶稣如何忍受了罪人的顶撞，这样你们心里就不会因丧气而疲倦。
